name: Meringue Nests with Passion Fruit Ice Cream and Summer Frui
recipeIngredient: 2 Large Ripe Mangoes, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 180 degrees F.
2. Butter an 11-by-17-inch baking sheet. Dust lightly with flour and tap out excess.
3. Mark 6 evenly spaced circles on the floured surface using a cookie cutter.
4. Whisk granulated and confectioner's sugars together.
5. Whip egg whites to soft peaks, gradually adding half of the sugars while beating.
6. Fold in remaining sugars by hand.
7. Pipe nests onto prepared sheet. Add a second ring on top.
8. Bake for 2 hours until dry but not browned. Cool and store airtight up to 5 days.
Passion Fruit Ice Cream:
1. Process passion fruit pulp into a purée. Set aside.
2. Whisk egg yolks, salt with 1/4 cup sugar.
3. Cook half-and-half, cream, and remaining sugar until boils, then temper egg mixture.
4. Cool custard over ice water, stir in passion fruit purée. Refrigerate at least 3 hours.
5. Freeze according to ice cream maker's instructions.
Mango Sauce:
1. Process mangoes with sugars, lemon juice, rum (if using) in a food processor.
2. Strain and refrigerate until serving.
Assemble:
1. Thin mango sauce with water to desired consistency.
2. Place nests on plates. Spoon mango sauce around edges, add passion fruit ice cream, and garnish with mint leaves.
6 Servings
Total Preparation Time: 1 1/2 hours plus freezing
